ValidationRule.description: #1099120 Validation to catch the unexpected update
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.Id = '0050X000009bp7dQAA', ISCHANGED(Employees_Min__c),
OR( AND( BEGINS(Polygraph_Company_Employees_Range__c, '1'), Employees_Min__c != 1 ), AND( BEGINS(Polygraph_Company_Employees_Range__c, '11'), Employees_Min__c != 11 ), AND( BEGINS(Polygraph_Company_Employees_Range__c, '51'), Employees_Min__c != 51 ), AND( BEGINS(Polygraph_Company_Employees_Range__c, '201'), Employees_Min__c != 201 ), AND( BEGINS(Polygraph_Company_Employees_Range__c, '501'), Employees_Min__c != 501 ), AND( BEGINS(Polygraph_Company_Employees_Range__c, '1001'), Employees_Min__c != 1001 ), AND( BEGINS(Polygraph_Company_Employees_Range__c, '5001+'), Employees_Min__c != 5001 ) ))
